subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. The missive from his honor 'Attár, which was dispatched unto thee, hath reached this Servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی و عنایتی مکتوب جناب عطار که بانجناب ارسال نموده عبد حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @unity; oneness of humanity
